2184030.name: Noslrac
2184030.description:
Noslrac is a content-rich 2D dungeon crawler ARPG featuring four distinct classes, each with unique playstyles and skill trees. Take control of your conqueror, master powerful combat systems, chain devastating abilities, and defeat Noslrac’s relentless minions to gain formidable power and find the cure for the dying King of Banglesway before all hope is lost.

KEY FEATURES

Choose from four unique classes, each with differing playstyles, combat styles, and skill trees for your campaign in defeating Noslrac and his undying horde. Will you take up the mantle of the Champion and smash your enemies with powerful blows, or will you master the elements with the Wizard and rain fire and meteors from afar? Whichever your style, there’s a class ready for you.

Each class features a unique talent tree that expands and enhances your core combat style. Earn skill points as you level up and invest them to further increase your strength to dominate the most powerful of foes.

Defeat enemies to earn keys that unlock Onslaughts, powerful dungeons with ever-increasing difficulty and rewards. Venture into their depths and cut down relentless hordes of enemies and discover powerful loot. Every Onslaught features three unique modifiers, making every run a fresh and challenging experience. Conqueror the Onslaught, and you will be rewarded handsomely.

Accumulate resources from your conquests to craft potent and fully customizable items. Whether you forge a chest plate that increases your damage or a weapon that restores life with every kill, the choice is ultimately yours. Combine any modifiers, sockets, and power you want to create the perfect arsenal and tailor your conqueror and their items to how your playstyle.

·       Four distinct classes.

·       Cohesive and dynamic combat styles.

·       Endless endgame progression.

·       Randomly generated and fully customizable items.

·       Over 50 achievements to unlock.

·       Campaign editor for creating your own adventures.
2184030.supported_languages: 英语, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 西班牙语 - 西班牙
